name: Veggies in a Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spray a pan with Pam cooking spray.
3. Unroll the dough and spread it evenly over the pan.
4. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Allow the crust to cool completely.
6. In a large bowl, mix together the soft cream cheese, mayonnaise (or Miracle Whip), and Ranch dressing.
7. Add the chopped broccoli and cauliflower to the mixture, stirring until well combined.
8. Spread the mixture evenly on the baked crust.
9. Top with the chopped red pepper.
